violations.text: Grill draw unit was observed held at 60 degrees Fahrenheit. Food items chicken wings, chicken, steam veg, salmon, tilapia, squid, seafood medley, seafood stuffing, and shrimp all 60DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit came unplugged from wall. Food items all tempted at 60DF. Food items voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

ROP fish items salmon, and tilapia were observed being defrosted in an intact package. ROP fish items were out of temperature and were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/17/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and refrigerator door gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non food contact surfaces must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2025
The handle on Prep unit 1 was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2025
The floor in the kitchen was observed with broken tiles and low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/13/2025
